# Sample Markdown Fixture

A short fixture used by the content-type test suite. The front-matter
above carries the canonical promoted keys (title, author, language,
tags, categories, draft, date) so the markdown extractor has something
non-trivial to surface.

## Section

Body text. Word count and section detection both run over this file.
